title: Use of large pieces of printed circuit boards for bioleaching to avoid ‘precipitate contamination problem’ and to simplify overall metal recovery
author: Adhapure, Dhakephalkar, et al.

steps.title: Method details
steps.instruction: There were some attempts of using bioleaching for removal of metals from electronic waste [1–5,7,8]. Most of the research workers have used powdered sample/pulverized sample of waste printed circuit board for removal of metals [1,3,5,7,8].
